## Error Type

<!-- Which error class does this fall under? -->

- [ ] `ForgotAnniversaryError` - Missed an important date
- [ ] `SaidCalmDownError` - Used forbidden phrases
- [ ] `LeftOnReadError` - Communication timeout
- [ ] `ComparedToExError` - Made an inadvisable comparison
- [ ] `TriedToFixError` - Offered solutions when listening was needed
- [ ] `UsedLogicOnFeelingsError` - Applied reason to emotions
- [ ] Other (please describe)
